title: Claude Code HTML Presentation Prompt Pack
description: This trending skill proves massive demand for AI-generated HTML slide decks, but there's no prompt pack teaching freelancers/devs how to prompt their way to polished presentations without coding. The gap is a structured pack of 25 prompts covering layouts, themes, content types, and client deliverables.
gumroad_description:
You've been asked to build a presentation, and you're about to waste two hours fighting with PowerPoint when Claude could do it in ten minutes — if you knew how to ask.

Who this is for:
— Freelancers delivering client decks without a design background
— Developers who'd rather write a prompt than touch Keynote
— Agency owners who want repeatable, billable presentation workflows

What's inside:
— 20 copy-paste prompts covering layouts, themes, content structures, and client-ready slide logic
— Markdown and JSON formats so you can drop them straight into your workflow
— Prompts tested across Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini — no tool lock-in
— Coverage for pitch decks, reports, onboarding flows, and educational content

Each prompt is built to get you a working HTML slide deck on the first try, not after six rounds of back-and-forth.

This is the shortcut between "I know AI can do this" and actually shipping polished work.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
